repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Kappa Omicron Nu, Omicron Mu chapter records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Kappa Omicron Nu Honor Society. Mu Chapter

did.physdesc: Administrative records, annual reports, scrapbooks,photographs, corporate charter
did.abstract: Records of the Mu chapter of Kappa Omicron Nu.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Mu Chapter of Omicron Nu, a national home economics honor society, was founded at Cornell in 1919. Dr. Georgia L. White of the Michigan Agricultural College acted as the installing officer. The aims of the organization were to promote scholarship and to further home economics education at Cornell. The chapter also provided a scholarship to the freshman woman in Home Economics with the highest scholastic standing. In 1990, Omicron Nu merged with Kappa Omicron Phi to form Kappa Omicron Nu Honor Society.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes membership records and membership book; information about scholarships; minutes of meetings, 1920-1989; secretary's book, 1936-1942; records of events; presidents' annual reports, 1940s-1960s; scrapbook about the founding of the chapter, 1919; photographs; and programs, and the original charter from 1919.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Kappa Omicron Nu, Omicron Mu chapter records, #23-2-2702. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Fall - eligible students, initiation cards, awards
Spring initiation: scholarship recipients, recommendations, letters, meetings
Awards, elections, special activities, membership directory
Association of College Honor Societies information booklet, scholarships/awards, special activities, elections
Memos on finding faculty advisors, strengths/weaknesses of chapter
Leather book containing the signatures of members
Information concerning donated pins and badges
New members, reports, awards, eligible students
Fall Initiation - New members, initiation cards and certificates, letters and invitations, list of eligible students
Spring initiation - Letters and invitations, list of eligible students
Fall initiation - Programs, new members, invitations, eligible students, initiation cards
Fall initiation - Initiation cards, invitations to membership; Spring initiation - program, reports, invitations

Fall initiation - List of eligible students, recommendations, invitees, letters from national chapter, program, correspondence, initiation cards, membership recruitment report, chapter remittance form
Spring initiation - Program, list of new members, list of current members, initiation cards, invitations/applications, correspondence
Fall initiation - Initiates, initiation financial forms, officers and addresses, correspondence; Spring initiation - initiation financial forms, members (full and junior), program
Fall initiation - Eligible students, list of members, list of initiates, elections
Kappa Omicron Nu pins from four distinguished members
Papers/Articles about Home Economics and Omicron Nu
Spring - Initiation, new members, financial report, national reports
Activities, pictures, awards/scholarships, reports and forms for national group
Mu Chapter constitution, bylaws, budget, annual financial reports
Report forms sent to National Omicron Nu
